title: Surgical safety-net documentation

treatment_and_management.text: Supports patient-centred explanation, understandable language, interpreter support, written information, questions, and documented education.
treatment_and_management.rationale: Supports understandable education, written information and questions for surgical safety-net documentation; no decision is generated.
treatment_and_management.evidence_extract: Supports patient-centred explanation, understandable language, interpreter support, written information, questions, and documented education.

follow_up.text: Supports recovery observation, pain or nausea assessment, discharge criteria, instructions, escort, complications, handover, and follow-up only as clinician-completed documentation.
follow_up.rationale: Supports documented discharge instructions, complications, handover and follow-up for surgical safety-net documentation; no decision is generated.
follow_up.evidence_extract: Supports recovery observation, pain or nausea assessment, discharge criteria, instructions, escort, complications, handover, and follow-up only as clinician-completed documentation.

follow_up.text: Supports documenting warning symptoms, when to return for re-evaluation, agreed review, and patient-initiated review if symptoms recur, persist, worsen, or cause concern.
follow_up.rationale: Supports warning symptoms, agreed review and return if symptoms persist or worsen for surgical safety-net documentation; no decision is generated.
follow_up.evidence_extract: Supports documenting warning symptoms, when to return for re-evaluation, agreed review, and patient-initiated review if symptoms recur, persist, worsen, or cause concern.

additions.text: Supports recovery observation, pain or nausea assessment, discharge criteria, instructions, escort, complications, handover, and follow-up only as clinician-completed documentation.
additions.rationale: Supports documented discharge instructions, complications, handover and follow-up for surgical safety-net documentation; no decision is generated.
additions.evidence_extract: Supports recovery observation, pain or nausea assessment, discharge criteria, instructions, escort, complications, handover, and follow-up only as clinician-completed documentation.

additions.text: Supports patient-centred explanation, understandable language, interpreter support, written information, questions, and documented education.

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Condition and procedure, individualized warning symptoms, contact route, urgency, timeframe, access barriers, comprehension, emergency disposition and responsible follow-up remain absent.
No diagnosis, risk conclusion, investigation, treatment, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, escalation or disposition is generated for surgical safety-net documentation.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
